summary: Iteration 89: Tested new features - Sparklines, Floating Assistant, Help Center, Feedback, Community Comments, Smart Suggestions. Backend: 14/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working. One bug found: Floating Assistant AI chat fails because it doesn't create a session before calling /api/coach/chat.

critical.issue: FloatingAssistant.js calls /api/coach/chat without session_id. Backend returns 404 'Session not found'. Need to create session first via POST /api/coach/sessions.

integration_issues.issue: Chat messages fail with 'trouble connecting' because FloatingAssistant.js doesn't create a coach session before sending messages. The /api/coach/chat endpoint requires a session_id.

action_items: Fix FloatingAssistant.js to create a coach session on first message (POST /api/coach/sessions) and store session_id for subsequent messages
Alternative: Create a simpler /api/assistant/chat endpoint that doesn't require session management for quick help queries
critical_code_review_comments: FloatingAssistant.js line 41-44: Missing session_id in request body. Backend coach.py line 213-217 requires session_id to find the session.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI components work, AI chat integration broken)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed feedback and comments for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Dashboard sparklines working (7-day arrays for moods/journals/activity), 2) Smart suggestions working, 3) Floating assistant button visible but AI chat broken (needs session), 4) Help Center with FAQs/Guides/Contact working, 5) Feedback submission/history working, 6) Community comments on Crystals and Blessings (Stream tab) working. Key data-testids: floating-assistant-btn, assistant-panel, assistant-input, assistant-send, help-center-page, feedback-page, community-comments-{feature}.

dashboard_sparklines.details: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns sparkline.moods, sparkline.journals, sparkline.activity (7-day arrays)

smart_suggestions.details: GET /api/dashboard/suggestions returns personalized suggestions based on user activity

floating_assistant_button.details: Button visible on all pages except /auth and /tutorial

floating_assistant_panel.details: Panel opens with quick actions (Help Center, Submit Feedback, Quick Reset)

floating_assistant_chat.details: AI chat fails - FloatingAssistant.js doesn't create session before calling /api/coach/chat

help_center.details: FAQs with search filter, 9 tutorial guides, Contact section

feedback_page.details: Submit feedback with type/category/message, view submission history

community_comments_blessings.details: Comments component visible on /blessings page (Stream tab only)

backend_endpoints.POST /api/coach/chat: REQUIRES SESSION - needs session_id in request
